question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest total CTA 'L' station entries? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A transit planner wants to identify the lowest-ridership year to benchmark service planning.

1.fact: Summing monthtotal by year (from month_beginning) for 2005-2010, 2005 has the lowest total at 154987157.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest total CTA 'L' station entries? (Parse month_beginning to Year; sum monthtotal by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum monthtotal by year (2005-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2005.
